SEARCH
Package net.boricj.bft.coff

Class CoffSymbolTable

java.lang.Object
net.boricj.bft.coff.CoffSymbolTable
All Implemented Interfaces:
Iterable<CoffSymbolTable.CoffSymbol>, Collection<CoffSymbolTable.CoffSymbol>, List<CoffSymbolTable.CoffSymbol>, SequencedCollection<CoffSymbolTable.CoffSymbol>, IndirectList<CoffSymbolTable.CoffSymbol>, StreamWritable, Writable
public class CoffSymbolTable extends Object implements IndirectList<CoffSymbolTable.CoffSymbol>, Writable
COFF symbol table containing symbol entries. Symbols represent functions, variables, sections, and other named entities.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    CoffSymbolTable.CoffSymbol
    A COFF symbol table entry.
    class 
    CoffSymbolTable.CoffSymbolFile
    File symbol with auxiliary record containing source filename.
    class 
    CoffSymbolTable.CoffSymbolFunction
    Function symbol with one auxiliary function-definition record.
    class 
    CoffSymbolTable.CoffSymbolSection
    Section symbol with one auxiliary section-definition record.

    RECORD_LENGTH

      public static final int RECORD_LENGTH
      Length in bytes of one COFF symbol record.

      • Constant Field Values

  • Constructor Details

    • CoffSymbolTable

      protected CoffSymbolTable(CoffFile coff, CoffFile.Builder builder)
      Creates an empty symbol table for a builder-backed COFF file.
      Parameters:
      coff - parent COFF file
      builder - COFF file builder

    • CoffSymbolTable

      protected CoffSymbolTable(CoffFile coff, CoffFile.Parser parser) throws IOException
      Parses a symbol table from a parser-backed COFF file.
      Parameters:
      coff - parent COFF file
      parser - COFF file parser
      Throws:
      IOException - if an I/O error occurs while parsing symbols
